parameters.content:
## 13 — Bounce / reply forwarder

Webhook entrypoint that ESPs (Instantly, Resend) post to. Normalises payloads to a shared shape and forwards to the admin app's webhook routes (which are the source of truth for `email_sends.bounced/replied/opens/clicks` and downstream `leads.status` flips).

Kept in n8n so retries / DLQ are visible in the n8n UI rather than being silent in the admin app.
